nasb.text: “Observe the month of Abib and celebrate the Passover to the Lord your God, for in the month of Abib the Lord your God brought you out of Egypt by night.

esv.text: “Observe the month of Abib and keep the Passover to the Lord your God, for in the month of Abib the Lord your God brought you out of Egypt by night.

cnv.text: “你要守亞筆月，向耶和華你的　神守逾越節，因為耶和華你的　神在亞筆月的一個晚上，把你從埃及地領出來。

ccb.text: “你们要在亚笔月为你们的上帝耶和华守逾越节，因为祂在这个月的一个晚上带领你们离开了埃及。
